_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Chronic Care Package: If the baby requires stay beyond the upper limit of usual stay in Package no MN004A or MN005A for conditions like severe BPD requiring respiratory support, severe NEC requiring prolonged TPN support
clinical_indications: Meningitis/ Ventriculitis [Please review the relevant package for more details]
Post-surgical prolonged stay especially ileostomy for jejunal/ileal atresia
Total parenteral nutrition requirement for above mentioned conditions

clinical_thresholds.value: ALOS of MN004A (30 days) or MN005A (45 days)
clinical_thresholds.note: beyond upper limit of usual stay for MN004A or MN005A

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings and planned line of management
Arterial Blood Gas (ABG) Analysis (for Necrotizing Enterocolitis)
Abdominal X-ray (AP & lateral decubitus) (for Necrotizing Enterocolitis)

claim.label: Detailed Procedure notes and indication (if any)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes including history, signs and symptoms, vitals, examination findings, planned line of treatment and advice for admission (refer the clinical criteria mentioned above)?
Did the hospitalization stay requirement more than the days mentioned in packages (MN004A/MN005A) documented?
Was the imaging indicative of surgery and long-term requirement of Total parenteral nutrition (TPN) documented?
Was the documented gestation age < 32 weeks/preterm?
Was the oxygen requirement >28 days documented?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure notes with indication available (optional)?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Hospitalization stay requirement not documented as more than the days mentioned in packages (MN004A/MN005A).
For Necrotizing Enterocolitis: Imaging not indicative of surgery or long-term requirement of Total parenteral nutrition (TPN).
For Necrotizing Enterocolitis: Documented gestation age not < 32 weeks/preterm.
For Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia: Oxygen requirement not documented as >28 days.
Pre-authorization clinical notes are incomplete or missing evaluation findings, planned line of management, or advice for admission, or do not refer to the clinical criteria.

Mandatory Necrotizing Enterocolitis documents (Complete blood count, ABG Analysis, Serum Electrolytes, Occult stool test, Abdominal X-ray, USG Abdomen) not submitted or are incomplete when NEC is the primary diagnosis.
Mandatory Bronchopulmonary Dysplasia document (Chest X-ray) not submitted or is incomplete when BPD is the primary diagnosis.

clinical_key_pointers: Meningitis/ Ventriculitis [Please review the relevant package for more details]
Post-surgical prolonged stay especially ileostomy for jejunal/ileal atresia
Total parenteral nutrition requirement for above mentioned conditions
